overall.description: First-person exploration of a coastal amusement park plaza at sunset in a video game (Cyberpunk 2077). The player walks past a burning vehicle, descends stairs to a covered boardwalk, emerges into a fountain plaza with NPCs, and circles the Grand Imperial Mall building with a roller coaster visible in the background.

scene_state.functional_zone: coastal amusement park plaza with burning vehicle

agents.ego_description: walking steadily past a burning vehicle toward a palm-lined boardwalk with the Grand Imperial Mall visible ahead

entered.detail: wrecked car engulfed in flames with black smoke rising
large modern building with distinctive geometric roof structure and orange neon signage
tall steel roller coaster track silhouetted against the sunset sky
tall palm trees lining the right side of the plaza
building with green neon circular signage

segments.scene_description: The segment opens in a wide plaza at sunset with a burning vehicle on the left. The Grand Imperial Mall building and a roller coaster dominate the background. The camera moves forward on paved concrete toward a descending staircase, with palm trees lining the right side.

events.description: begins descending stairs to lower boardwalk level
enters covered walkway beneath the upper plaza structure

agents.ego_description: walking down stairs and proceeding along a covered wooden boardwalk beneath the plaza

entered.detail: weathered wooden planks forming a walkway through overgrown vegetation
concrete and wooden overhead structure providing partial cover

segments.scene_description: The player descends stairs to a lower level wooden boardwalk, entering a semi-covered walkway beneath the plaza. The burning vehicle disappears from view behind as the path proceeds under concrete support structures with the Grand Imperial Mall now visible in the distance.

scene_state.functional_zone: open plaza with circular fountain structure

events.description: exits covered walkway into open plaza with fountain
encounters first NPC pedestrians in the plaza near the fountain

agents.ego_description: emerging from the covered area and walking across the open plaza toward a circular fountain structure

notable_agents.action: pedestrian in yellow shirt standing near the fountain structure

entered.detail: circular concrete fountain basin with water and neon lighting accents

segments.scene_description: Exiting the covered walkway, the scene opens into a sunlit plaza featuring a circular fountain. The Grand Imperial Mall now dominates the center view while NPC pedestrians appear near the fountain. The roller coaster structure shifts to the left as the camera circles the plaza.

scene_state.functional_zone: plaza perimeter around Grand Imperial Mall

events.description: approaches stairs leading back to upper level

agents.ego_description: walking around the perimeter of the mall building, passing other pedestrians and approaching a stairway

notable_agents.action: group of pedestrians walking along the mall perimeter

segments.scene_description: The player continues around the plaza perimeter, passing NPCs walking along the path. The circular fountain falls behind as the camera approaches a stairway leading back to the upper level, with the Grand Imperial Mall remaining prominent on the left.

events.description: begins ascending stairs to return to upper boardwalk level

agents.ego_description: walking up stairs and continuing along the upper level boardwalk

entered.detail: elevated concrete walkway with metal railings overlooking the lower plaza

segments.scene_description: The final segment shows the player ascending stairs back to the upper boardwalk level. From this elevated position, the roller coaster structure returns to the center of the frame while palm trees now line the right side. The path continues along the upper walkway as the video ends.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey from a wide sunset plaza down into a sheltered boardwalk and back up to an elevated walkway. It begins on paved concrete beside a burning vehicle, moving past palm trees toward a descending staircase with the Grand Imperial Mall and a roller coaster looming in the distance. As the camera descends, the scene shifts into a semi-covered wooden boardwalk beneath concrete supports before opening back out into a sunlit plaza centered around a circular fountain and populated by pedestrians. The camera then circles the perimeter of the plaza, leaving the fountain behind as it approaches a set of stairs leading upward. Finally, the view ascends back to the upper boardwalk level, where the roller coaster returns to the center of the frame and palm trees once again line the path.
